review_notes: Revised after architect/critic-style review to make Cloudflare Vite plugin the explicit shell and to elevate Workers Free plan CPU/cron constraints into Phase 1 and test gates.
architect_findings: Need explicit go/no-go adapter seam because router/auth/supabase layers are Node-bound
Need explicit Cloudflare free-plan budget checks for subrequests, cron count, worker size, asset count, and UTC scheduling
Need p95 performance baseline/comparison in test spec per repo guidance
architect_summary: Direction approved with required additions around Node-bound seams, Cloudflare free-plan budgets, UTC cron handling, and p95 verification
critic_retry: explicit respawn due missing initial agent id
